assertions.expectation: Categorizes notifications by type: auto-upgrade scheduled, new version available, end-of-life/deprecation, security patch
assertions.reason: Response clearly categorizes all notification types including 'Auto-upgrade Scheduled', 'New Version Available', 'End of Support (EoS) Warnings', and 'Security Patch Notifications'

assertions.expectation: Assigns urgency levels to each category (security patches = highest, new version available = lowest)
assertions.reason: Response assigns security patches to CRITICAL priority level (highest), while new version available notifications are assigned to MEDIUM priority (though not explicitly lowest, the hierarchy is clear)

assertions.expectation: End-of-life warnings require action: plan upgrade before the support window closes
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states EoS warnings as CRITICAL requiring 'Plan upgrade immediately' with specific action items including scheduling upgrade planning meeting within 48h and timeline guidance

assertions.expectation: Auto-upgrade scheduled notifications should trigger pre-upgrade checklist execution
assertions.reason: Response includes detailed pre-flight checklist for scheduled upgrades including checking PDBs, bare pods, resource quota, and workload health

assertions.expectation: Security patch notifications may require expedited upgrades outside normal maintenance windows
assertions.reason: Response specifically mentions security patches 'may auto-upgrade within days' and includes action for 'emergency patch within 24-48h' for critical security issues

assertions.expectation: New version available notifications are informational — use for planning, not immediate action
assertions.reason: Response categorizes 'New Version Available' as MEDIUM priority with action 'Add to backlog, review release notes' and states it's for planning purposes

assertions.expectation: Recommends setting up Pub/Sub or Cloud Monitoring alerts for GKE upgrade events
assertions.reason: Response focuses on email filtering rules and notification management but does not mention Pub/Sub or Cloud Monitoring alerts setup

assertions.expectation: Mentions GKE release notes as the source for understanding what changed in each version
assertions.reason: Response explicitly mentions 'Review GKE release notes for breaking changes' in the action items for new version available notifications
